blocks.canonical: Stop Rewriting. Start Connecting. Mohio keeps your content linked, consistent, and reusable by design.
blocks.html:
Stop Rewriting. Start Connecting.
Mohio keeps your content linked, consistent, and reusable by design.

blocks.canonical: Product teams spend countless hours rephrasing the same ideas across various tools — from initiative documents to presentations, specifications, user stories, test cases, and help documents. This leads to outdated content, misalignment, and slow validation loops.
blocks.html: Product teams spend countless hours rephrasing the same ideas across various tools — from initiative documents to presentations, specifications, user stories, test cases, and help documents. This leads to outdated content, misalignment, and slow validation loops.

blocks.canonical: Mohio proposes a new solution: modular, reusable knowledge blocks, authored once and adapted across views. This can radically improve product team alignment, reduce manual rework, and improve stakeholder trust.
blocks.html: Mohio proposes a new solution: modular, reusable knowledge blocks, authored once and adapted across views. This can radically improve product team alignment, reduce manual rework, and improve stakeholder trust.

blocks.canonical: Product professionals routinely rework the same core information across multiple formats and tools — a costly and error-prone process.
blocks.html: Product professionals routinely rework the same core information across multiple formats and tools — a costly and error-prone process.

blocks.canonical: Writing detailed documents in Word that are hard to digest and validate.
blocks.html: Writing detailed documents in Word that are hard to digest and validate.

blocks.canonical: Converting those into user stories or slide decks—reshaping the same content over and over.
blocks.html: Converting those into user stories or slide decks—reshaping the same content over and over.

blocks.canonical: Copying backlog items into roadmaps, and then again into presentations.
blocks.html: Copying backlog items into roadmaps, and then again into presentations.

blocks.canonical: Watching testers rewrite stories into functional tests.
blocks.html: Watching testers rewrite stories into functional tests.

blocks.canonical: Turning test scenarios into release notes and help pages.
blocks.html: Turning test scenarios into release notes and help pages.

blocks.canonical: This cycle of copy-paste-driven documentation leads to a bloated, fragile process where changes must be manually synced across formats. Despite different outputs, the meaning rarely changes—just its representation does.
blocks.html: This cycle of copy-paste-driven documentation leads to a bloated, fragile process where changes must be manually synced across formats. Despite different outputs, the meaning rarely changes—just its representation does.

views.title: Mohio
views.purpose: Product Initiative: Align product, design, and engineering teams around a unified model for reusable, traceable product content across multiple artifact types.
